name: edpath
description: EdPath is an AI learning agent that turns an uploaded PDF into an interactive, human-in-the-loop-approved MCQ lesson. It runs a deterministic LangGraph teaching workflow (plan, approve, quiz loop, summarize) where the LLM only fills content at the generative nodes, grounded entirely in the PDF text. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
